title: jack's realistic modpack
description: basically if realistic survival games combine
body:
this modpack adds realism and challenge at the same time. people who like realistic survival games should honestly install this. this modpack adds
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

some shaders,realistic tree chopping,a body health system,stamina system,minimap,and more

</details>
WARNING IN BETA
high end pc recommended for use of shaders
